{{Quote|This asteroid belt is one giant minefield. One proton torpedo, even a stray blaster shot, can start an explosion that'll make the one that shattered Peragus II look like a kid's pop detonator.|[[Atton Rand]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
The '''Peragus asteroid field''' was a formation of fuel-rich asteroids that was created after the first attempt to set up a mining station on [[Peragus II]].

==History==
In the process of drilling for fuel when the first station was set up, the mining crew accidentally discovered just how flammable and unstable Peragian fuel could be. The resulting explosion shattered the surface of Peragus II, sending vast quantities of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] crust and upper mantle into space. The cooling-down of the blown planetary material created the asteroid field, which hung in geosynchronous orbit over the original blast site. Further mining was halted until the beginning of the [[Telosian Restoration Project]] on the nearby planet of [[Telos IV]], which required large amounts of fuel to keep [[Citadel Station]] in orbit. The [[Peragus Mining Facility]] was established inside one of the largest asteroids in the field and would supply Citadel Station with mined material until [[3951 BBY]].

The asteroid field was destroyed when a critically-damaged [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', made an emergency landing at the Peragus Mining Facility; the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] had been transporting the injured [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]], who was actively pursued by [[Darth Sion]]. After healing their wounds and fighting their way through hostile mining droids, the Exile and their companions boarded the ''Ebon Hawk'' and fled the facility, with Sion and the [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']] in hot pursuit. As the Ebon Hawk cleared the asteroid field and prepared to make the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']] fired a shot at one of the asteroids in a last-ditch attempt to destroy the freighter. The resulting explosion created a chain reaction that destroyed the mining facility and the entire asteroid field itself.

One of the asteroids was designated [[32-19K]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
